subject: v2-S04 iter 7: TPS warp + hull-restricted image-NCC
description: Replace aniso-similarity with TPS (thin_plate) for the K=5 constellation warp. Evaluation grid restricted to inside the K-anchor convex hull (where TPS interpolates rather than extrapolates). Compute Δ NCC vs LP+sz-pin baseline and vs aniso variant. Mirrors the manual workflow per docs/04 §2.4.
